text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Today marks the start of another summer camp.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Trainer! ♪ Welcome to our vacation home! ☆

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
I'm looking forward spending another hot summer
with you. ☆
choice_data_list: You mean "a hot summer with everyone," right?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Gonna be the hottest one yet. Heehee! ☆
